creator: pstef@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Pawel Stefaniak from comment #2)
After a while:

# zpool status meh
  pool: meh
 state: ONLINE
remove: Removal of vdev 0 copied 47.5K in 1h0m, completed on Thu Apr 21 19:58:42 2022
        144 memory used for removed device mappings
config:

        NAME          STATE     READ WRITE CKSUM
        meh           ONLINE       0     0     0
          md1         ONLINE       0     0     0

errors: No known data errors
